query: The spec is approved — break it into an implementation plan
How are we going to build user-registration? Write the task breakdown.
Спека утверждена, распиши docs/plans с задачами под каждое требование
Turn docs/specs/password-reset/spec.md into steps a subagent can execute
User signed off on docs/specs/users/spec.md yesterday — before anyone touches apps/*/src, produce docs/plans/users.md with traced tasks, generators, and file paths.
We finished the spec review call. Next: map each SHALL in docs/specs/invoice-numbering/spec.md to an ordered implementation task.
Capture what the new feature should do before we design anything
Draft the SHALL requirements and GWT scenarios for password reset
We're still debating acceptance criteria — refine the GWT scenarios in the spec before planning
Execute the approved plan in docs/plans/user-registration.md and build the feature
The plan is approved — start implementing task 1 with turbo gen
Run pnpm verify and fix the failing tests
